title: N-PAMP Bridge Protocol-ID Registry
description: Schema for the JSON representation of registries/bridge_protocol_ids.csv: an array of row objects. protocol_id is EITHER a single 8-bit value (0x01) OR an inclusive range low-high of two 8-bit values (0x05-0x0F); accepted via oneOf. carriage_class and mapping_reference may be '--' for reserved/range rows. assignment_policy is constrained to the observed RFC 8126 policy tokens. Wrong-format protocol_id, missing column, out-of-enum assignment_policy, and empty name/description are caught here; DUPLICATE / OVERLAPPING protocol_id values are caught by the companion validate-registries.py.

oneOf.description: Single 8-bit bridge protocol id, 2 hex digits (e.g. 0x01).
Inclusive range low-high of two 8-bit ids (e.g. 0x05-0x0F).

protocol_id.description: A single 2-hex protocol id OR an inclusive low-high range of two 2-hex ids.

name.description: Protocol name or marker such as (reserved) / (unassigned) / (experimental) / (private use); MUST be non-empty.

carriage_class.description: Carriage class (JSONRPC, HTTP, STREAM, ...) or '--' for reserved/range rows; MUST be non-empty.

mapping_reference.description: Mapping-document reference (e.g. NPAMP-MAP-MCP) or '--'; MUST be non-empty.

assignment_policy.description: RFC 8126 assignment policy governing this id or range.
